title: Sam restraining-order lawyer notes — Apr 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • Notes for a 2pm Wednesday lawyer meeting at 433 First Ave SE — concerning the restraining order Yahir holds against Sam.
  • His position to communicate: he would like to dismiss the restraining order because Sam hasn't contacted him since it was placed, but does not want her contacting him in the future.
  • Future-protection clause: "I will consider filing another protective order in the future if Sam either directly or indirectly contacts or threatens my physical safety again."
  • Single line at the bottom: "De Nada bar in Austin" — unrelated, a reminder for the 2025 11 01 austin places checklist later.

Key quote

"Although I would like to dismiss the restraining order, I do not want Sam to contact me in the future."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The legal coda of the Sam arc:
    • 2024 04 27 sam breakup script (Apr 2024 — breakup discovery)
    • 2024 07 06 (Jul 2024 — still thinking about her)
    • 2025-04-25-restraining-order-lawyer (Apr 2025 — legal apparatus active)
    • 2025 09 25 emily trails words like sam (Sep 2025 — pattern-comparison with Emily)
  • The 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook "call the cops about the Sam situation" + "print stalking order" todos are the action-trail that produced this lawyer meeting — confirming the arc's escalation.
  • Pairs with Memory's lonely-solo-in-Austin line — Yahir's relationship history is load-bearing context for his current state.

Open questions

  • Was the restraining order actually dismissed, or maintained?
  • Has Sam contacted again post-Apr 2025?
